LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON OCTOBER 27, 2023, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES ARISING FROM THE ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. BOTH PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 17, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
